chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No.342 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Hearing of Case/Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.1578 of 2024 2. For hearing of main case 09.05.2025 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocate for Applicant Ms. Saima Syed, Advocate for Respondent --------------------- Through this Reference Application, the Applicant has impugned Judgment dated 24.04.2024 passed by the Customs Appellate Tribunal Bench-II, at Karachi in Customs Appeal No.K-20/2024 proposing various questions of law. Learned Counsel for the Applicant submits that the Tribunal has erred in law by deciding the classification of the goods, whereas, the matter ought to have been referred to the Classification Committee of the Appraisement Collectorate in terms of Chapter-1 of CGO 12/2002. Accordingly the orders passed by the forums below are hereby set-aside. This Reference Application is disposed of with pending application by referring the matter to the Classification Committee pursuant to Judgment passed by the Hon’ble Supreme Court of Pakistan in K. S. Sulemanji Esmailji.1 ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Qurban 1 Additional Collector of Customs MCC of Appraisement (West) Customs House Karachi v. Messrs K.S. Sulemanji Esmailji and Son (Pvt.) Ltd., Karachi (2025 PTD 260)
